helphint: type 'help' to view all available commands
serverh:
Usage: server <address>
Shows information about a Minecraft server
uuidh:
Usage: uuid <ign>
Looks up a player's UUID by username
edith:
Usage: edit <language/theme> <value>
Edits the Hyprx configuration
ipinfoh:
Usage: ipinfo <ip>
Shows detailed information about an IP address
fetchh:
Usage: fetch <socks4/socks5>
Scrapes fresh proxies of the given type
monitorh:
Usage: monitor <ip>
Monitors player joins and leaves on a server (requires queries enabled)
dnsh:
Usage: dns <domain>
Shows all DNS records for a domain
targeth:
Usage: target <domain>
Enumerates all subdomains and their resolved IPs
proxyh:
Usage: proxy <ip> <mode>
Starts a Velocity proxy that redirects to the target server
fakeproxyh:
Usage: fakeproxy <ip> <mode>
Starts a Velocity proxy that logs all commands sent to the server
checkh:
Usage: check <file>
Checks the status of Minecraft servers listed in a file
mcscanh:
Usage: mcscan <ip> <range> <threads>
Scans for Minecraft servers on a given IP range
Example: mcscan 0.0.0.0 1-65535 10
scanh:
Usage: scan <ip> <range> <threads>
Performs a multi-threaded TCP port scan on an IP address
Example: scan 0.0.0.0 1-65535 10
bungeeguardh:
Usage: bungeeguard <ip> <token>
Creates a BungeeGuard-authenticated proxy
iphistoryh:
Usage: iphistory <domain>
Retrieves historical IPv4 addresses for a domain
websearchh: Crawls Minecraft server lists to discover and enumerate servers
ogmurh:
Usage: ogmur <users/random> <server> <commands> <keep> <count> <proxy>
Connects bots sequentially and runs a command list
ogv2h:
Usage: ogv2 <users/random> <server> <commands> <keep> <count> <proxy>
Connects bots in parallel threads and runs a command list
kickh:
Usage: kick <username> <server> <proxy>
Kicks a player from a cracked server
shellh:
Usage: shell <host> <port> <bind_port>
Listens on a port using netcat
connecth:
Usage: connect <username> <server> <proxy>
Joins a server with a bot and lets you send messages
rconh:
Usage: rcon <server> <password>
Connects to a server's RCON console
brutrconh:
Usage: brutrcon <server> <file>
Brute-forces RCON using passwords from a file
fuzzh:
Usage: fuzz <url> <file> <threads>
Fuzzes a URL for hidden paths or subdomains
Example: example.com/FUZZ or FUZZ.example.com
sendcmdh:
Usage: sendcmd <username> <server> <commands> <proxy>
Sends a bot that executes commands from a file
pteroh:
Usage: ptero <panel_url>
Exploits a vulnerability to create an account on a Pterodactyl panel
initmsg: Please wait while we set up your environment.
sendmsgh:
Usage: sendmsg <server> <message> <username/all>
Sends a chat message via a connected bot
tcpfloodh:
Usage: tcpflood <host:port> <threads>
Floods a server with TCP connections
udpfloodh:
Usage: udpflood <host:port> <processes>
Floods a server with UDP packets
logfloodh:
Usage: logflood <host:port> <coroutines>
Floods a server with Minecraft login requests
reloadh: Restarts Hyprx without closing the terminal
